name: DTRACK Process Creation Detected
description: Detects process creations with specific command-line parameters known to be associated with DTRACK malware infections. This rule looks for the "echo EEEE >" pattern, which has been observed in DTRACK activity.

prompts.prompt: DTRACK malware process creation detected with suspicious command-line parameters. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of DTRACK infection.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process (e.g., cmd.exe, powershell.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The parent process of the detected process.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the process.
